escalation.rationale: US naval blockade has halted 90% of Iran's sea trade while ceasefire negotiations continue amid regional tensions.

ticker_items: US blockade halts 90% of Iran's sea trade within 36 hours
Israel-Lebanon ceasefire to begin within hours after 6-week campaign
Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing US-Iran negotiations
North Korea shows serious increase in nuclear weapon production capability
Russia threatens European drone factories supplying Ukraine

eastern_europe.description: Russian missile and drone strikes killed 14 civilians in overnight attacks.
Russian forces conducted mass strikes on Ukrainian military and energy sites following deadly drone attacks in southern Russia.

middle_east.description: Sirens sounded in northern Israel following drone infiltration from Lebanon.
Israeli strikes continue in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire announcement.
Israel demolished 1,400+ buildings in southern Lebanon since March 2 while expanding security zone.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll
US soldiers killed in Iran conflict
Gulf states deaths in Iran war

observers.description: Pakistan continues mediating US-Iran talks in Islamabad as negotiations resume after initial round failed to reach agreement. Pakistani officials expressing optimism for breakthrough in second round of talks.

Italy suspended automatic renewal of defense agreement with Israel over Lebanon campaign. Prime Minister Meloni announced decision during speech in Verona amid increasing criticism of Israeli operations.
Poland urging EU to release €90 billion Ukraine loan following Orbán's ouster from Hungary. Polish officials argue increased financial support could affect ceasefire prospects and regional dynamics.
Australia announces defense spending increase to 3% of GDP by 2033 citing growing global threats. Decision follows pressure from Trump administration for allies to boost military expenditures.
IAEA chief warns of rapid increase in North Korean nuclear weapons production at Yongbyon reactor. Kim Jong Un oversaw cruise missile and anti-warship missile tests from naval destroyer over weekend.
China vetoed UN Security Council resolution on Strait of Hormuz freedom of navigation alongside Russia. Reports suggest Iran used Chinese satellites to target US bases, which China denies.

Turkey's Roketsan defense company is rapidly expanding to become a leading global missile exporter amid the Middle East conflict, eyeing a top 10 global exporter ranking as regional demand for defense systems increases.

financial.notes: European airlines face potential jet fuel shortages within weeks if oil supplies from the Strait of Hormuz remain blocked.
